title: Diverse Baseline Resilience
description: Detects when systems acknowledge multiple baselines (regional, cultural, genetic, lifestyle) and adapt offerings accordingly, affirming diversity instead of collapsing into a single 'average'.
indicators: Retail and design systems provide multiple size/fit baselines
Health assumptions adjust to local or family patterns
Systems adapt to plural baselines without erasure
